final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire wen,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (wen) begin
        q <= d; // Write data to SRAM cell
    end
    // If wen is low, maintain the value of q (do nothing)
end

endmodule
